title: Form Re-Submit
excerpt: Before a recent platform update, there was an option in the form builder to automatically reload the form to submit another entry. That appears to be missing now. Additionally, clicking the “submit another” button and us…

posts.author: jthorn (Josiah Thorngate)
posts.cookedHtml: Before a recent platform update, there was an option in the form builder to automatically reload the form to submit another entry. That appears to be missing now. Additionally, clicking the “submit another” button and using the direct to url functionality to reload the form takes the whole browser window to the form url, rather than just reloading within the widget like it used to. Am I missing something? This seriously hampers our workflow…

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Josiah,

To confirm under the thank you screen tab, you no longer have this option?

Screen Shot 2023-11-06 at 1.11.20 pm704×826 47.2 KB

From my understanding we haven’t made any changes to this option, so will investigate this with our internal team

posts.author: jthorn (Josiah Thorngate)
posts.cookedHtml: There used to be a checkbox to automatically reload the form for another submission, which no longer exists.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hm, can you please send me a private message with a screenshot of your workform settings under the thank you screen tab? We might need our tech team to investigate!
